title: Gemini visual review S15 panel a2

payload.failure_mode_positive_invariant: Re-run the Gemini reviewer from a working directory whose sandbox root contains all three files (run from movie-wiki/ or pass an absolute image path inside the granted sandbox) so the panel PNG and identity_refs are readable; no visual scores were produced this pass.
payload.notes: Gemini (auto-gemini-3) visual review TIMED OUT — the reviewer could not read S15_panel_a02.png within its sandbox root, so no visual dimensions were scored (all 0; safezone/stray flags unverified). This is a tooling/sandbox failure, NOT a verdict on the panel — the image was not actually assessed. Fail-safe: the panel gate must treat a timed-out reviewer as a forced retry rather than inferring a pass. positive_invariant: re-run Gemini from a working directory whose sandbox root contains all three files (run from movie-wiki/ or pass an absolute image path inside the granted sandbox) so the PNG + identity_refs are readable on the next pass.
